form.formComment: Freshened for 31 days. Last run finished tenth of 21 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Baring Bingham Novices' Hurdle on March 11 over 4200m, 7 len behind King Rasko Grey carrying 73kg at $12. Run before finished second of 12 starters at Leopardstown in the G1 Tattersalls Ireland Novice Hurdle on February 1 over 3218m, on rain affected going; a nose behind Talk The Talk with 75.5kg at $4.50. Continues to improve. Worth another chance in a suitable race.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 31 day letup. Last run finished sixth of 21 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Baring Bingham Novices' Hurdle on March 11 over 4200m, 4.5 len behind King Rasko Grey carrying 73kg at $19. Start to post a big 13 len win. Chepstow on February 13 over 3200m slow track defeating Doujadou with 74kg at $1.30 in a hurdle. Will prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last run finished second of 8 starters at Newbury on March 20 over 4100m, 0.8 len behind Le Frimeur carrying 75.5kg at $2.60. Before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 2.75 len Ascot on January 17 over 3900m on rain affected going defeating Tripoli Flyer with 69kg at $4 in a hurdle. Needs a career best to feature.

Previous preparation first-up favourite; posted a big 12 len win. Chepstow October 10 over 3200m defeating Blue Carpet with 69.5kg at $2.80. Interesting if attracting support.

form.formComment: Freshened for 49 days. Last outing finished sixth of 12 runners at Kempton Park in the G2 Dovecote Novices' Hurdle on February 21 over 3200m, 21 len behind Klub De Reve carrying 73.5kg at $9.50. The start before that; tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 4.5 len Musselburgh on February 1 over 3100m defeating Mossy Fen Road carrying 73kg at $10 in a hurdle. Best watched.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming led to the turn and faded badly finished 14th of 16 starters at Fontainebleau on February 28 over 2200m, slow track; 17 len behind Briona with 59kg at $8.30. Last start finished third in a small field at Auteuil in the G2 on March 22 over 3900m, slow track; 3 len behind Leader Sport carrying 64kg at $21. Market confidence would be noteworthy.

form.formComment: On a four run winning streak. Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 2.75 len Sandown Park on March 7 over 3980m slow going defeating Get On George carrying 75kg at $5.50 in a hurdle. Race before favourite; won by 1.75 len Windsor on January 18 over 4000m on rain affected going defeating Top Jimmy carrying 74.5kg at $4 in a hurdle. Impressed last start. Can't be ruled out into a Grade 1.
